title: Closures, Lexical State, Currying, and Factories · Transformation Lens: Late Binding
summary: Create configurable validators without mutable module globals or late-binding bugs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp late binding increment in a closure-based validator factory with capture tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect and repair late-bound loop variables in generated callables.
Trace lexical name capture and cell lookup after the enclosing call returns.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
